notes: WoW 2.4.3 game client (Final Burning Crusade patch). 32-bit PE, MSVC compiled. ~27,706 functions, 510 RTTI entries. Phase 1: 762 Lua API functions. Phase 2: 219 networking functions (415 opcodes, mangos-tbc cross-reference). Phase 3: ~100 vtable/ctor/frame-factory functions. Phase 4: 181 WowClientDB<T>::Load DBC loader instantiations. Phase 5: 7 WowClientDB<T>::Unload bodies. Phase 6: 57 source path sweep (WowSvcsClientServices, RealmList, GlueMgr, CDataStore, PatchFiles, UIMacros, BlizzardCore IO layer). Phase 7: 45 UI widget method tables (Texture, FontString, Frame, ScrollBar, CombatText registration tables). Phase 8: ~361 UI widget registration table sweep (SIMPLEFONT 19, CSimpleFrame 76, CSimpleFontString 24, CColorSelect 12, CStatusBar 9, CSlider 11, CScrollFrame 8, CScrollingMessageFrame 77, CMessageFrame 28, CEditBox 52, CCheckButton 6, CButton 40; tables at 0x911340-0x911740 and 0xbc40b0-0xbc4840).
